message:
perf(demo,text): add performance benchmarks and grapheme tests

Demo showcase benchmarks:
- async_tasks_bench.rs: Async task spawning and management benchmarks
- log_search_bench.rs: Log search performance benchmarks
- virtualized_search_bench.rs: Virtualized list search benchmarks

Text crate:
- search_bench.rs: Text search performance benchmarks
- grapheme_consistency.rs: Grapheme cluster consistency tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
